description: Lap 1 rewrites seed/schedule.json to extend bob's shift from 8-14 to 8-16, closing the 14-16 gap so every hour of the 24-hour period is covered exactly once. check_coverage.py exits 0 on lap 1.

interactions.agent_output: Ran check_coverage.py: hours 14-16 are an uncovered gap. Extending bob's shift end from 14 to 16 so it abuts carol's 16-24 shift with no gap and no overlap. Not touching the checker.
interactions.notes: The fix — check_coverage.py now exits 0. bl run reaches DONE on lap 1, keyless, no external tool.

interactions.agent_output: Fix already applied; no further changes needed.
interactions.notes: Fallback for any lap beyond 1 — should not be reached in the happy path.
